overall.description: A first-person walk along a Mediterranean-style waterfront promenade at sunset, transitioning through a garden path to an overlook, then cutting to a stormy boat ride approaching the Addermire Institute. The footage is from a video game (Dishonored 2) with high-quality cinematic rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade with white railings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a covered waterfront promenade at sunset, passing white columns and railings with the ocean visible to the left

entered.detail: painted white metal railing running along the waterfront edge
calm sea water reflecting the orange and purple sunset colors
sun setting on the horizon with warm orange and pink sky
whitewashed building facade with architectural columns
ornate black lamppost with glowing light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a serene waterfront promenade at sunset. The camera moves forward along a covered walkway with white railings, overlooking calm waters that reflect the warm colors of the setting sun. The atmosphere is peaceful and empty of other people.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-covered garden walkway with overhead canopy

events.description: enters covered garden area with dense tree canopy overhead, transitioning from open promenade to shaded path

agents.ego_description: walking through a shaded garden path with dense tree cover overhead and white architectural elements on the sides

entered.detail: white painted wooden or metal roof structure providing partial cover
dense tree canopy with twisted branches creating shade overhead
large rectangular planter with sculpted bushes

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered garden walkway with dense tree canopy blocking the sky. The path is covered in gravel and lined with stone planters and white pillars. The ocean view is temporarily obscured by the trees and structures as the camera moves through this sheltered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal overlook with cliff views

events.description: exits covered garden back to open waterfront with panoramic view of distant cliffs and city lights

agents.ego_description: walking along open waterfront promenade with expansive views of the sea and distant illuminated cliffs on the left

entered.detail: tall dark cliff face with twinkling city lights scattered across its slope
warm yellow lights from buildings built into the cliffside
small lamp post at the water's edge

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered garden, the scene opens to a wide coastal overlook. The camera walks along the water's edge with views of a massive cliff face on the left, dotted with the warm lights of a hillside city. The sunset continues to glow on the horizon over the calm sea.

scene_state.functional_zone: stormy sea approach to Addermire Institute

events.description: abrupt transition from sunset promenade to stormy boat ride on rough seas
boat arrives at stone dock and camera transitions from riding to walking up stairs

agents.ego_description: riding in a small boat across choppy stormy waters toward a large stone building, then disembarking and ascending grand stone stairs

entered.detail: wooden boat interior with metal railings and seating visible in foreground
large historic stone building with multiple stories, balconies, and ornate architecture
wide stone staircase leading up to the building entrance
ornate wrought iron archway with decorative elements at the top of the stairs
stacked wooden cargo crates and boxes near the dock

segments.scene_description: The scene cuts to a stormy boat ride across rough seas, approaching the imposing Addermire Institute. The weather is overcast and dark, with choppy water surrounding the boat. The camera moves toward the building, docks, and then transitions to walking up grand stone stairs flanked by an ornate iron gate, approaching the entrance of the historic structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey that begins on a serene sunset promenade and transforms into a dark, stormy approach to a gothic institution. It begins by gliding along a covered walkway with white railings, where calm waters reflect the warm colors of the setting sun. As the camera moves forward, the open view is temporarily obscured by a sheltered garden corridor of gravel paths, stone planters, and a dense tree canopy. The scene then expands onto a wide coastal overlook, revealing a massive cliff face dotted with the lights of a hillside city before shifting abruptly to a boat ride across choppy, overcast seas. Finally, the camera moves toward the imposing Addermire Institute, transitioning from the rough water to a walk up grand stone stairs flanked by an ornate iron gate.
